sourceMovie.title: What Happened to Monday
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: What Happened to Monday (2017) stuck because it commits to its science fiction premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Tommy Wirkola's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The science fiction and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If What Happened to Monday clicked for you, Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after What Happened to Monday?
faq.answer: Try Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials, Looper, Insurgent—each shares DNA with What Happened to Monday while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is What Happened to Monday?
faq.answer: What Happened to Monday (2017) is best described as Science Fiction, Thriller, Mystery, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is What Happened to Monday worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
